sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_running_difference (id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT id, runningDifferenceStartingWithFirstValue(value) AS running_diff FROM test_running_difference ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE test_running_difference ADD COLUMN new_value Float64;
UPDATE test_running_difference SET new_value = runningDifferenceStartingWithFirstValue(value) WHERE id = 2;
